hotels.name: Hotel Antigua Miraflores
hotels.description_fr:
L'Hotel Antigua Miraflores propose gratuitement une connexion Wi-Fi et un parking. Il vous accueille à proximité du Parque del Amor et du Parque Central de Miraflores avec ses spectacles folkloriques nocturnes, à côté de la plage de Waikiki, le long de l'océan Pacifique Sud.
L'Hotel Antigua est situé dans un quartier calme et sécurisé, près de bons restaurants, de boutiques et de lieux de vie nocturne animés.
Les chambres sont dotées d'un mobilier artisanal, de lits queen-size de qualité et d'une télévision par câble. Les suites comprennent une baignoire spa et une kitchenette.
Le restaurant et le bar-salon de l'établissement servent une variété de boissons, de petits-déjeuners, de plats péruviens, de cafés et de desserts.
hotels.description_en:
Hotel Antigua Miraflores offers free Wi-Fi, free parking nearby the Love Park and Miraflores Central Park with its nightly folklore shows. It is nearby Waikiki Beach, along the South Pacific Ocean.
Hotel Antigua is situated in a quiet and secure area, close to fine restaurants, shopping and a lively nightlife.
All rooms include hand-crafted furniture, quality queen size beds, and cable TV. The suites include spa baths and kitchenettes.
A variety of beverages, breakfast options, Peruvian dishes, coffee and desserts are served at the hotel’s restaurant and lounge bar.
Guests can make use of on-site services that include a tour desk, money exchange, art sales, laundry, luggage storage, and airport transfers.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.6 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
El Hotel Antigua Miraflores ofrece conexión WiFi y aparcamiento gratuito cerca del Parque del Amor y del Parque Central de Miraflores, con sus espectáculos folclóricos nocturnos. Está cerca de la playa de Waikiki, en la costa del Pacífico Sur.
El Hotel Antigua está situado en una zona tranquila y segura, cerca de restaurantes, tiendas y animados locales de ocio nocturno.
Todas las habitaciones incluyen muebles hechos a mano, cama grande de calidad y TV por cable. Las suites cuentan con bañera de hidromasaje y zona de cocina.
El restaurante y bar salón del hotel sirve una gran variedad de bebidas, distintos desayunos, platos peruanos, café y dulces.
hotels.description_pt:
Hotel Antigua Miraflores offers free Wi-Fi, free parking nearby the Love Park and Miraflores Central Park with its nightly folklore shows. It is nearby Waikiki Beach, along the South Pacific Ocean.
Hotel Antigua is situated in a quiet and secure area, close to fine restaurants, shopping and a lively nightlife.
All rooms include hand-crafted furniture, quality queen size beds, and cable TV. The suites include spa baths and kitchenettes.
A variety of beverages, breakfast options, Peruvian dishes, coffee and desserts are served at the hotel’s restaurant and lounge bar.
Guests can make use of on-site services that include a tour desk, money exchange, art sales, laundry, luggage storage, and airport transfers.
hotels.description_it:
Situato vicino alla spiaggia di Waikiki, lungo la costa del Pacifico meridionale, l'Hotel Antigua Miraflores vi offre il WiFi in omaggio e l'accesso a un parcheggio senza costi aggiuntivi nei pressi del Parque del Amor e del Parque Central di Miraflores, con i suoi spettacoli serali di folklore.
Scegliendo l'Hotel Antigua alloggerete in una zona tranquilla e sicura, caratterizzata da una vivace vita notturna e da negozi e ottimi ristoranti.
In ogni camera troverete mobili artigianali, letti queen-size di qualità e TV via cavo. Tutte le suite presentano anche un angolo cottura e una vasca da bagno con idromassaggio.
Presso il ristorante e il lounge-bar dell'hotel gusterete numerose bevande, proposte per la colazione, piatti peruviani, caffè e dessert.

hotels.name: Second Home Peru
hotels.description_fr:
Le Second Home est une majestueuse auberge 4 étoiles située près de la plage Playa Barranco de Lima. L'hébergement comprend un décor de style antique et dispose d'une vue sur la mer et d'une piscine ainsi que d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et de la télévision par câble.
Vous logerez dans un espace doté de meubles rigoureusement choisis, du chauffage et d'une salle de bains avec baignoire. Les chambres sont spacieuses et comportent de beaux parquets et de hauts plafonds. Certaines sont également pourvues d'un balcon avec vue sur la mer.
Le Second Home Peru est situé à 3 km du quartier populaire de Miraflores et à 20 minutes en voiture du centre historique de Lima.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement.
hotels.description_en:
This Second Home is a majestic 4-star guesthouse situated by Lima´s Playa Barranco Beach. Accommodation features antique-style décor, offering sea views and swimming pool, plus free Wi-Fi and cable TV.
Guests at Second Home Peru get accommodation with selected furniture, heating and bathroom fitted with tub. Rooms are spacious, displaying beautiful wooden floors and high ceilings. Some also provide a balcony and sea views.
Second Home Peru is located 3 km from the popular Miraflores neighbourhood and a 20-minute drive from Lima´s historical centre.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.8 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Este Second Home es una majestuosa casa de huéspedes de 4 estrellas situada junto a la playa Barranco de Lima. Ofrece habitaciones decoradas siguiendo un estilo antiguo con vistas al mar, piscina, conexión inalámbrica a internet gratuita y TV por cable.
Las amplias habitaciones del Second Home Perú tienen un mobiliario selecto, calefacción, baño completo con bañera, unos hermosos suelos de madera y techos altos. Algunas cuentan con un balcón con vistas al mar.
El Second Home Perú se encuentra a 3 km del popular barrio de Miraflores y a 20 minutos en coche del centro histórico de Lima.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,8 para viajes de dos personas.
Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Esta Second Home é uma pousada majestosa, de 4 estrelas, situada na Praia do Barranco, em Lima. A acomodação apresenta uma decoração em estilo antigo, oferecendo vistas para o mar e piscina, além de acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e televisão por cabo.
São disponibilizadas aos hóspedes da Second Home Peru acomodações com mobiliário seleccionado, aquecimento e casa de banho equipada com banheira. Os quartos são espaçosos, exibindo belos pisos em madeira e tectos altos. Alguns também oferecem uma varanda e vista para o mar.
A Second Home Peru está localizada a 3 km do popular Bairro de Miraflores e a 20 minutos de carro do centro histórico de Lima.
Os casais gostam particularmente da localização – deram uma pontuação de 9,8 para uma viagem a dois.
hotels.description_it:
Situata presso la spiaggia Playa dal Barranco a Lima, la maestosa struttura a 4 stelle Second Home offre alloggi arredati in stile antico con vista mare, piscina, connessione Wi-Fi gratuita e TV via cavo.
Le spaziose camere del Second Home Peru, caratterizzate da splenditi pavimenti in legno e soffitti alti, sono dotate di mobili esclusivi, riscaldamento e bagno con vasca. Alcuni alloggi vantano anche un balcone e viste sul mare.
Il Second Home Peru si trova a 3 km dal famoso quartiere di Miraflores e a 20 minuti di auto dal centro storico di Lima.
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,8 per un viaggio a due.
Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Wyndham Grand Costa Del Sol Lima Airport
hotels.description_fr:
Elegant Accommodation: Wyndham Grand Costa Del Sol Lima Airport in Lima offers a 5-star experience with spa facilities, sauna, fitness centre, terrace, restaurant, bar, and indoor swimming pool.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy private check-in and check-out, paid shuttle service, 24-hour front desk, concierge, fitness room, hot tub, and wellness packages.
Dining Options: The modern restaurant serves Peruvian, local, and international cuisines with brunch, lunch, dinner, high tea, and cocktails. Breakfast includes warm dishes, juice, pancakes, cheese, and fruits.
Prime Location: Located inside Jorge Chavez International Airport, providing guests easy access to terminals for a stress-free and convenient stay.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Wyndham Grand Costa Del Sol Lima Airport in Lima offers a 5-star experience with spa facilities, sauna, fitness centre, terrace, restaurant, bar, and indoor swimming pool.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy private check-in and check-out, paid shuttle service, 24-hour front desk, concierge, fitness room, hot tub, and wellness packages.
Dining Options: The modern restaurant serves Peruvian, local, and international cuisines with brunch, lunch, dinner, high tea, and cocktails. Breakfast includes warm dishes, juice, pancakes, cheese, and fruits.
Prime Location: Located inside Jorge Chavez International Airport, providing guests easy access to terminals for a stress-free and convenient stay.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Wyndham Grand Costa Del Sol Lima Airport
Alojamiento elegante: El Wyndham Grand Costa Del Sol Lima Airport de Lima ofrece una experiencia de 5 estrellas con zona de spa, sauna, zona de gimnasio, terraza, restaurante, bar y piscina cubierta.
Comodidades: Se puede hacer el check-in y check-out de manera privada y se ofrece servicio de traslado de pago, recepción 24 horas, conserje, zona de gimnasio, bañera de hidromasaje y paquetes de bienestar.
Opciones para comer: El moderno restaurante sirve cocina peruana, local e internacional con brunch, almuerzo, cena, té alto y cócteles. El desayuno incluye platos calientes, zumo, tortitas, queso y frutas.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de Wyndham Grand Costa Del Sol Lima Airport
